d.name: CakePnut
d.narrative:
🍰🥜 CakePnut_CTO is here to sweeten the space 🚀

From a simple idea to a buzzing community movement, CakePnut blends the fun of memes with real on-chain energy. Small cake… but BIG potential. This is where nutty vibes meet serious growth.
